title: Best Hotel Ever
wikitext:
[]: Best. Hotel. Ever.             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Thu Mar 21, 2013 3:19 pm Ladies and gentlemen, I present to you...and Evangelion themed hotel , presented to you by 3 overexcitable Japanese guys! The audio quality goes odd about halfway through, you have been warned. I'm gonna be honest...I want to visit this hotel. The statues are a bit creepy though.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Mar 21, 2013 8:55 pm I learned about the rooms a couple years ago but haven't seen a video of what the interior is like. IIRC they are not cheap.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Mar 21, 2013 10:31 pm At least they know enough to keep Rei behind the glass.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Mar 21, 2013 11:56 pm Old old news: http://www.evageeks.org/2011/02/a-live-look-at-evangelionroom/

[]:             Quote Post by Oz » Fri Mar 22, 2013 1:19 am Oriental Radio's Nakata seems to be involved with everything Eva.
